# UltraFake Resource Pack

Want to troll your friends? **UltraFake** makes every ore texture look exactly like stone or deepslate! Diamonds, iron, gold—they’re all hidden in plain sight. Watch your friends mine for hours and rage when they can’t find anything.

## Features
- Stone ores disguised as stone
- Deepslate ores disguised as deepslate
- Nether ores disguised as netherrack
- Perfect for pranking servers or YouTube videos
